learnings: review-archive recurrence: always fix consumer regex when producer output changes
backlog-health: \s+ matches newlines in JS—never use for same-line matching near section headers
Date.now() returns milliseconds number, not Date object
hook-warnings count inflated by recurring session-start warnings — root causes already suppressed
all 25 alerts acknowledged — no actionable items this session
Velocity system was dead data — 55 entries, all zeros. Removed entirely.
Consolidation script treated review source names as patterns — fixed extraction.
Hook-warnings dominated alerts (13/34) — all stale from merged branch.
ESLint 8720-error regression root cause: .claude/worktrees/ not in ignore list — worktree copies being double-linted. Fixed in eslint.config.mjs (+1 line).
Ratchet baselines ETIMEDOUT only happens via session-start hook wrapper (20s timeout insufficient for Windows fnm startup + 3500-file scan). Bumped to 60s.
Suppression messagePattern field uses case-insensitive substring, NOT regex. Pre-2026-04-05 entries using .* regex syntax never matched.
Statusline unacked count uses hook-warnings-log.jsonl + per-type ack timestamps (not hook-warnings.json). Must bump per-type ack to clear.
Pattern warnings in hook-warnings.json can become stale after files are fixed — checker reports 0 violations but warning persists until manually cleared.
fixes: .claude/state/alert-suppressions.json: added S0 App Check suppression (60d expiry)
.claude/hook-warnings.json: cleared 3 stale entries (pipeline-ratchet-baselines + 2 stale pattern warnings)
.claude/state/hook-warnings-ack.json: bumped 4 ack timestamps to clear statusline

learnings: Skip-abuse spike was stale worktree test failures — tests pass clean (3604/0). Override count will decay.
Enforcement verification failed due to null metrics — violations_after:null→0 fixed, entry promoted to verified.
Review archive #505 gap was numbering artifact — added to KNOWN_SKIPPED_IDS in both parse-review.ts and check-review-archive.js.
Hook-warnings propagation-staged entry persisted after fix — cleared stale entry manually.
fixes: reviews.jsonl: deduped ID 506, added 5 missing titles, fixed consolidation number

learnings: pending-refinements pipeline produced 665/686 (97%) of alert noise — claude-md-annotation route extracts CLAUDE.md heading fragments as behavioral patterns with no automation possible. Filed DEBT-45651, suppressed checker.
volume-spike guard fired (40x previous run: 17 → 686). Single-category dominance is the recurring pattern, not generalized stress.

Pre-commit audit-s0s1 100% skip rate is CORRECT behavior (gated on staged_files_match docs/audits/*.jsonl). hook-completeness checker reports raw skip count without checking gate condition — false positive.
cyclomatic-cc check duration +394% (1085 → 5355ms) coincides with PR #508 adding scripts/cas/* (4 large new JS files). Real but not blocking.
Reviews JSONL has ghost records (id:508→pr:499, id:85 dup of rev-85, 86-pr509 mismatch, 2 unknown-id placeholders) — pre-existing reconciliation bug. Not new to this session.
gh dependabot #68 (Next.js DoS, fix-available) deferred — auto-fix would bump next within 16.2.x minor, not auto-applied without explicit approval.
